scripts.build: npm run build -w @flux/shared && npm run build -w @flux/api && npm run build -w @flux/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @flux/web && npm run lint -w @flux/api && npm run lint -w @flux/shared
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @flux/shared && npm run typecheck -w @flux/api && npm run typecheck -w @flux/web
